PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS GIVEN DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE OF COMPLIANCE WITH CIVIL CODE 2923.5. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1113(D). Off Calendar Apr-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: COURT CALL APPEARANCES:
Irma Martinez, Esq. of Alvarado Smith, 415-624-8665 for defendant and moving party JP Morgan Chase
Cindy Magana, Esq. of Law Offices of Gene Choe, 213-639-3888 for plaintiff and opposing party Myung Choi

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A.'S, AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTIONS 1,2 AND 5; SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTIONS 3,4,6 AND 7 BECAUSE DEFENDANT CANNOT BE HELD LIABLE FOR WASHINGTON'S MUTUAL'S CONDUCT. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
